parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { command: "docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -A -F'|' -c \"SELECT opportunity_title, agency, naics_code, set_aside, contract_value, decision_outcome, winner FROM gda_win_loss ORDER BY decision_date DESC LIMIT 50;\"" } }];

const winLoss = $('Fetch Win Loss').first().json.content || '';
return [{ json: { command: "docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -A -F'|' -c \"SELECT dept, naics_code, set_aside, count(*) as cnt, avg(estimated_value)::bigint as avg_val, avg(gda_score)::int as avg_score FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE estimated_value > 0 GROUP BY dept, naics_code, set_aside ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 100;\"", winLoss } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, stored: $('Parse & Store Patterns').first().json.pattern_count, patterns: $('Parse & Store Patterns').first().json.patterns }) }}
